title: FGV Pack - MTR/NTE RP
description:
This resource pack is an add-on for the Minecraft Transit Railway mod with NTE mod. It adds some trains and objects of the FGV (Valencia Metro) in the game.

(⚠ Not affiliated with any real brand displayed in the pack)
body:
# 🇪🇸 FGV Pack
## NTE Required

The resourcepack includes:

**Trains:**
- FGV 3600 Series (Ex-FEVE, blue coloured)
- FGV 3600 Series (Original FGV logo)
- FGV 3600 Series (3602 series, renovated prototype)
- FGV 3700 Series (Prototype)
- FGV 3700 Series (Original FGV logo)
- FGV 3700 Series (With MetroValencia logos)
- FGV 3900 Series (MetroValencia logos)
- FGV 3900 Series (FGV logos)


**Rails:**
- 1068mm rail.
- Double gauge 1068mm + 1435mm rail.
- Powered double gauge 1068mm + 1435mm rail.
- Powered 1068mm rail.
- Powered 1435mm rail.


**Sounds:**
- Custom sounds for FGV 3700 and FGV 3900 series


**Scripting:**
- Added exterior displays showing the train destination.


**Objects:**
- Platform signs
- Train halt sign
- MetroValencia logos (small and big version) to place on the wall
- Fake light block

You're allowed to modify it, use it in modpack or in servers.
